events.issue: publishUntyped() accepts channel: string and data: unknown — allows publishing any event without type checking, bypassing EventChannels type map
events.code: private publishUntyped(channel: string, data: unknown): void

events.issue: on() method uses untyped event parameter (event: string) — generic T is not constrained by EventChannels
events.code: on<T = unknown>(event: string, handler: EventHandler<T>, options?)

accessibility.issue: Pressable backdrop without accessibilityLabel or accessibilityRole — screen readers cannot identify this dismiss action
Pressable overlay without accessibilityLabel or accessibilityRole — touch target for closing notification center is unlabeled
Pressable send button without accessibilityLabel — users cannot identify the send action
Pressable action button inside chat bubble without accessibilityLabel

realtime.issue: subscribeToCoachRealtime returns cleanup function but is not a React hook — callers must remember to invoke cleanup; no enforcement of useEffect cleanup pattern
subscribeToNotificationCenter uses manual ref-counting for channel lifecycle — complex cleanup logic could leak if refCount desyncs
Channel name includes Date.now() timestamp — creates unique channel names that prevent channel reuse and may cause connection count pressure
subscribeToFeedChanges returns Promise<() => void> — async cleanup requires await before unsubscribing, easy to forget
realtime.code: export async function subscribeToFeedChanges(userId, callback): Promise<() => void>
